claim_boundary: Open-only adaptive-multiseed independent 8X6B/9E6Y computational Docking geometry surrogate; not binding, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission evidence.

components: prefreeze builder schema, status, roots, artifact graph, and audit hash closure
calibration runner pending-status correction and dual-claim/revision receipt emission
launcher manifest/freeze/receipt schema, campaign claim, trainer-result claim, and bundle-revision validation
ready-manifest tiny-smoke commands receive the exact frozen per-lane contact weights; pending prefreeze dry-run remains weightless
postcalibration ready manifest and implementation freeze emit and bind both claims plus bundle revision
bundle materializer requires and copies the corrected builder, runner, launcher, postcalibration, and test artifacts
tests cover all four frozen lane weights, pending weightlessness, freeze tamper rejection, smoke-receipt tamper rejection, and trainer-result claim closure
corrective_closure.identifier_note: The historical bundle revision identifier V2.2.1_STATUS_CONSTANT_ONLY names the triggering revision; this audit is authoritative for its broader nonnumeric technical closure scope.

defect.scope_correction: The V2.2.1 closure is not runner-only. The triggering defect is the stale status constant, while the immutable supersession also closes all nonnumeric execution contracts discovered during adversarial review.
defect.trigger: V2.2 calibration runner used a stale pending-manifest status literal and therefore failed before runtime creation.

trainer_result_claim_boundary: Open-only computational surrogate of independent 8X6B/9E6Y Docking geometry; not binding probability, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission evidence.
